title: ZOPPER Party Cup 450ml,10Red -10Blue Plastic Cups with 4 Ping Pong Balls, 24pcs Party Game Pong Set for Students Party Cups for Birthday,Party,Picnics, Weddings, Christmas, Anniversary, Summer Fun
features: COMPLETE 24-PIECE SET READY TO PLAY: Includes 10 red cups, 10 blue cups (450ml/16oz each) and 4 professional ping pong balls – everything needed for instant pong fun at parties, student accommodation, or casual gaming nights

450ML PROFESSIONAL CAPACITY CUPS: Generous 16oz plastic cups sized for authentic pong gameplay; durable, stackable design perfect for multiple rounds of tournament-style play without requiring replacements

PERFECT FOR STAG DOS, HEN PARTIES & CELEBRATIONS: Ideal Party game set for adults, students, BBQs, birthdays, garden parties, and social gatherings; encourages team play, laughter, and memorable moments with friends and family

EASY SETUP & REUSABLE DESIGN: Lightweight plastic construction allows quick table setup in traditional triangle formation; washable and reusable cups for repeated use across multiple events and party seasons

BRILLIANT VALUE PARTY ESSENTIAL: Professional-quality game set at unbeatable price; complete starter package eliminates need for additional purchases; satisfies game night requirements for groups of 4-8+ players
